hooks.command: for file in $CLAUDE_FILE_PATHS; do if echo "$file" | grep -q '\.py$'; then cd /Users/jason/dev/ai-stack/mcp-gateway/litellm-portal/backend && uv run ruff check --fix "$file" 2>/dev/null && uv run ruff format "$file" 2>/dev/null; fi; done
for file in $CLAUDE_FILE_PATHS; do if echo "$file" | grep -qE '(\.env|\.env\..+|teams\.yaml)$'; then echo 'BLOCKED: Cannot edit secret/config files (.env, teams.yaml)' >&2; exit 1; fi; done
